nodes.name: Snowy plover
nodes.summary: Snowy plover（Snowy plover，学名 Anarhynchus nivosus），分类上属于鸻形目，并归入鸻科，在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、人类活动扰动、气候变化。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: 美洲
nodes.summary: 美洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联24种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Pied-billed grebe、Pale-vented pigeon等24种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸻科
nodes.summary: 鸻科（Charadriidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联54种鸟类，如灰斑鸻、Tawny-throated dotterel、Pied plover等54种鸟类。

nodes.name: 加利福尼亚州
nodes.summary: 加利福尼亚州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联31种鸟类，包括黑嘴天鹅、帝雁、桂紅鴨等31种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Soda lake
nodes.summary: Soda lake是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Snowy plover、白鹈鹕，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸻形目
nodes.summary: 鸻形目（Charadriiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联310种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、短腿鸻、白鞘嘴鸥等310种鸟类。

nodes.name: Morro Strand State Beach
nodes.summary: Morro Strand State Beach是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Snowy plover，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

nodes.name: 鹹水湖
nodes.summary: 鹹水湖是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括斑长脚鹬、Snowy plover、Wilson's phalarope等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The snowy plover (Anarhynchus nivosus, formerly Charadrius nivosus) is a small shorebird found in the Americas

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The snowy plover (Anarhynchus nivosus, formerly Charadrius nivosus) is a small shorebird found in the Americas

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The snowy plover (Anarhynchus nivosus, formerly Charadrius nivosus) is a small shorebird found in the Americas

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This plover inhabits open areas in which vegetation is absent or sparse, in particular coastal sand beaches and shores of salt or soda lakes, where it feeds on invertebrates such as crustaceans, worms, beetles, and flies

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This plover inhabits open areas in which vegetation is absent or sparse, in particular coastal sand beaches and shores of salt or soda lakes, where it feeds on invertebrates such as crustaceans, worms, beetles, and flies

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The main threats are habitat destruction due to invasive beach grasses, urban development, as well as frequent disturbance due to recreational uses of beaches

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The main threats are habitat destruction due to invasive beach grasses, urban development, as well as frequent disturbance due to recreational uses of beaches

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: A 2018 study found that 98% of analyzed plovers in the Southern Great Plains had blood selenium levels exceeding the toxicity threshold. Discarded monofilament fishing lines are a known threat, but their impact on populations is unknown. In the future, effects of climate change, such as droughts and habitat loss due to sea level rise, are likely to become significant threats
